human_verification.notes: Reviewed research administration boundary controls, source-class coverage, research-backed workflow stages, sponsored-project and protocol evidence handling, consent and learner-record escalation, and scenario-to-ability coverage.

review_notes: Scenario coverage validates unauthorized protocol or award changes, missing evidence packages, conflicting records, consent and privacy gaps, formal approval blockers, ethics and academic-judgment refusal, program or study workflow handling, and tenant source conflicts.
Required education-and-research source classes are represented in the research summary.
No blocking unresolved research ambiguities remain for this validated specification-based package.

specialist_owned_evidence: Boundary decisions separate research administration from IRB finality, research ethics authority, consent validity, sponsor approval, grant allowability, budget approval, registrar finality, faculty review, grading, instructional judgment, accreditation signoff, privacy disclosure, legal interpretation, biosafety, and laboratory safety authority.
Research summary covers education and research governance, program, learner and study workflow references, and records, consent, and assessment handling standards.
Scenario suite covers missing records, conflicting systems, consent and access conflicts, formal approval blockers, study workflow dependencies, tenant adaptation, and official authority refusals.
Functionality map declares all shared, workflow-phase, and education-and-research abilities with scenario coverage.
notes: The lane remains `specification-based`; retained implementation is not claimed in this pack.

Runtime Promotion to a retained implementation requires explicit governance approval, implementation review, tenant authority-map validation, stable retrieval connectors, sponsor and IRB source validation, and sustained operational evidence.
